title: Skill
description: An atomic competency that a learner acquires. Skills are the smallest unit of progression in the curriculum.

id.description: Unique identifier for the skill, e.g. 'shell-redirect-stdout'.

track.description: Which track this skill belongs to.

module_id.description: The module this skill is part of.

description.description: One-sentence explanation of what this skill means concretely.

prerequisites.description: List of skill IDs that should be acquired before this one.

phase.description: Learning phase this skill belongs to.
